TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sander_Prosi, title = Sander_Prosi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sander_Prosi} }

S.FORM: Sandër Prosi mhtu squ 1920 kawas 1 cigat 6 nici ru 1925 kawas 3 gat 24 nici mhuqil, 65 kawra kawas niya. minkahul squ lomaniya na geki qu Aapaniya qani. aring 1947 kawas ru 1985 kawas qu pgeki nya. minkahul squ Aapaniya htagan nya, ru musa squ oawdiri weyena lru musa mqaws biru pinqwan p'agan g'nux qu hya, ana ga, wana ini suqi qmasuq pinqwasan na biru. 1947 kawas mnwah sanka' ziyit na qalan Aapaniya lru, wa thoyay maqan qu syoheng. pingeki nya hya ga, kbhul msyaw kwara qu geki na squliq. aring 1962 kawas ru 1975 kawas lga, mintiyaw squ Aapaniya ziyit na taygako sinsiy la.

Sandër Prosi mhtu squ 1920 kawas 1 cigat 6 nici ru 1925 kawas 3 gat 24 nici mhuqil, 65 kawra kawas niya. minkahul squ lomaniya na geki qu Aapaniya qani. aring 1947 kawas ru 1985 kawas qu pgeki nya. minkahul squ Aapaniya htagan nya, ru musa squ oawdiri weyena lru musa mqaws biru pinqwan p'agan g'nux qu hya, ana ga, wana ini suqi qmasuq pinqwasan na biru. 1947 kawas mnwah sanka' ziyit na qalan Aapaniya lru, wa thoyay maqan qu syoheng. pingeki nya hya ga, kbhul msyaw kwara qu geki na squliq. aring 1962 kawas ru 1975 kawas lga, mintiyaw squ Aapaniya ziyit na taygako sinsiy la.
S.PHON: s~ɕan**r pros~ɕi mħtu s~ɕqu **** kawas~ɕ * ʦ~ʨiɣat * niʦ~ʨi ru **** kawas~ɕ * ɣat ** niʦ~ʨi mħuqil, ** kawra kawas~ɕ nija. minkaħul s~ɕqu lomanija na ɣeki qu aapanija qani. ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ qu pɣeki nja. minkaħul s~ɕqu aapanija ħtaɣan nja, ru mus~ɕa s~ɕqu oaw*iri wejena lru mus~ɕa mqaws~ɕ βiru pinqwan pʔaɣan ɣʔnux qu ħja, ana ɣa, wana ini s~ɕuqi qmas~ɕuq pinqwas~ɕan na βiru. **** kawas~ɕ mnwaħ s~ɕankaʔ zijit na qalan aapanija lru, wa tħojaj maqan qu s~ɕjoħeŋ. piŋeki nja ħja ɣa, kβħul ms~ɕjaw kwara qu ɣeki na s~ɕquliq. ariŋ **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ lɣa, mintijaw s~ɕqu aapanija zijit na tajɣako s~ɕins~ɕij la.
